data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-05-13T10:08:23.001Z</current_datetime>

I have this MSTest test that uses [ExpectedException]. How should I modernize it to use Assert.ThrowsExactly instead?

```csharp
[TestMethod]
[ExpectedException(typeof(ArgumentNullException))]
public void CreateUser_NullEmail_ThrowsException()
{
    var service = new UserService();
    service.CreateUser(null, "John");
}
```

data.reasoningText:
The user wants to modernize their MSTest test from using `[ExpectedException]` attribute to using `Assert.ThrowsExactly`. This is a straightforward MSTest modernization question.

The modern approach replaces the attribute with an inline assertion, giving better control and allowing you to verify exception properties.
